arts.ttl: Arsenal and Tottenham Target 'Wants to Join Man Utd'
arts.sum: Man Utd are reportedly interested in signing Mathys Tel, and insider Paul O Keefe has said he favours an Old Trafford move over Arsenal or Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal are not spending in the January transfer window despite Man City's shopping spree
arts.sum: Arsenal supporters have been informed that their club's decision not to spend big in the January transfer window is strategic rather than as a result of fears relating to Profit and Sustainability Rules (PSR). "We know they have not been charged, we know they have been on UEFA’s watchlist recently, so maybe there is a bit of that in there too but from the outside looking in, there is no severe issue with PSR so it does seem to be a conscious decision from Arsenal not to spend but that could change in the next few days."

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal readying bid for £25m striker who hasn't scored a single goal this season
arts.sum: Arsenal’s approach to the January transfer window seemed to change instantly once the club caught wind how serious Gabriel Jesus’ knee injury was. Jesus won’t...

arts.ttl: “Already making contacts” – Fabrizio Romano’s exciting update on Arsenal & Liverpool transfer target
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool fans may be intrigued to see an update this afternoon from transfer journalist Fabrizio Romano. Although Romano doesn’t specifically mention the Gunners or the Reds, he has said that Premier League clubs are already making contacts over signing highly-rated young Ajax defender Jorrel Hato ahead of the summer. arts.ttl: Who will Arsenal play in Champions League round of 16? Draw and opponents explained
arts.sum: Arsenal have enjoyed a fine Champions League campaign so far, winning five of their seven league phase matches to all but certainly wrap up a place in the last-16

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer target set to cost €70million
arts.sum: Real Sociedad are reportedly set to demand as much as €70million for the transfer of Arsenal target Martin Zubimendi this summer. It already looks like the Zubimendi to Arsenal deal is advanced ahead of next season, but it could still be that there are some details to work out. arts.ttl: Arsenal defender Ayden Heaven set to turn down contract offer and join Manchester United
arts.sum: Heaven made his senior debut for Arsenal in the Carabao Cup earlier this season

arts.ttl: £105m cut-off no issue for Liverpool and Arsenal as FSG and KSE set budgets ahead of deadline day
Report: Arsenal pleasantly surprised by star’s availability as top talent keen on transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly surprised that a player of the calibre of Mathys Tel has become available in this January’s transfer window. The highly-rated 19-year-old has struggled for regular playing time at Bayern Munich and this has inevitably led to speculation over his future in the last few days. arts.ttl: Myles Lewis-Skelly still the real villain in Arsenal controversy despite FA U-turn
arts.sum: The FA's independent commission decided that the referee had been wrong to send off Arsenal's midfielder for cynically fouling Matt Doherty in the game at Wolves last Saturday
